case_title: MICHAEL DUMAS DMD VS. TRAVIS TINDLE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUMAS DMD, MICHAEL PH.D

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-04-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PEARLIE HICKS--MEDICAL BILLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $329.60 FILED BY DUMAS DMD, MICHAEL PH.D AS TO DEFENDANT TINDLE, TRAVIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
